message:
test(ftui-extras): add 11 edge case tests for plasma.rs (101→112) (bd-17wlv)

Cover negative/NaN/infinity time, quality-off early return, mismatched
buffer early return, BackdropFx::render() consistency with color_at()
for all 11 palettes, Ember fallback path, color_at clamping, scratch
capacity stability, and quality tier output differentiation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
